summary: Completed comprehensive testing of IPO Funding Module. All 13 features tested successfully with 100% pass rate. Backend APIs (29 tests) and Frontend UI (all pages and interactions) working correctly.
passed_tests: 1. Funding landing page (/funding) loads with disclaimer popup - PASS
2. Disclaimer popup has 'I Agree' and 'I Disagree' buttons - PASS
3. After agreeing, 4 pillar cards visible: Pre-IPO, Post-IPO, Partners, Quiz - PASS
4. Pre-IPO Funding page (/funding/pre-ipo) loads with 6 funding option cards - PASS
5. Pre-IPO funding cards have 'AI Fitment' and 'Get Expert Help' buttons - PASS
6. AI Fitment dialog opens and shows form fields - PASS
7. Post-IPO Funding page (/funding/post-ipo) loads with 5 funding option cards - PASS
8. Post-IPO funding cards have 'AI Fitment' and 'Get Expert Help' buttons - PASS
9. Funding Partners page (/funding/partners) loads with 4 tabs - PASS
10. Partners page shows real Indian partners (Kotak Mahindra, ICICI Securities, Indian Angel Network, SBI, etc.) - PASS
11. Funding Quiz page (/funding/quiz) shows funding type selection (Pre-IPO or Post-IPO) - PASS
12. Quiz questions load after selecting funding type - PASS
13. Dashboard shows IPO Funding module as enabled (no 'Soon' badge) - PASS
14. Sidebar shows IPO Funding nav item as enabled (no 'Soon' badge) - PASS
15. Backend API: GET /api/funding/pre-ipo-options returns 6 options - PASS
16. Backend API: GET /api/funding/post-ipo-options returns 5 options - PASS
17. Backend API: GET /api/funding/partners returns all 4 partner categories - PASS
18. Backend API: GET /api/funding/quiz-questions?funding_type=pre_ipo returns questions - PASS
19. Backend API: GET /api/funding/available-slots returns MOCKED time slots - PASS
20. Backend API: POST /api/funding/disclaimer-consent records consent - PASS
21. Backend API: POST /api/funding/ai-fitment returns probability score - PASS
22. Backend API: POST /api/funding/book-consultation creates consultation - PASS
test_credentials: Session created via mongosh for test-user-funding-* (cleaned up after testing)
seed_data_creation: None required - used existing demo data
context_for_next_testing_agent: IPO Funding Module is fully functional. Key test IDs: funding-page, disclaimer-agree-btn, disclaimer-disagree-btn, funding-pillar-pre_ipo, funding-pillar-post_ipo, funding-pillar-partners, funding-pillar-quiz, pre-ipo-funding-page, post-ipo-funding-page, funding-partners-page, funding-quiz-page, quiz-type-pre-ipo, quiz-type-post-ipo. The module uses GPT-5.2 for AI fitment and quiz evaluation. Calendar slots for consultation booking are MOCKED (returns predefined time slots).

mocked_apis.GET /api/funding/available-slots: Returns MOCKED available consultation time slots from a predefined list (09:00 AM to 05:00 PM)
